mapper.insert: insert into agent_artifact(conversation_id, run_id, message_id, dataset_id, artifact_type, version, title, status, payload_json, file_id, mime_type, preview_url, download_url, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values(#{conversationId}, #{runId}, #{messageId}, #{datasetId}, #{artifactType}, #{version}, #{title}, #{status}, #{payloadJson}, #{fileId}, #{mimeType}, #{previewUrl}, #{downloadUrl}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select artifact.* from agent_artifact artifact join agent_conversation conversation on conversation.id=artifact.conversation_id where artifact.id=#{id} and conversation.user_id=#{userId} and conversation.status!='deleted'
select * from agent_artifact where run_id=#{runId} order by id
select * from agent_artifact where conversation_id=#{conversationId} order by id
mapper.update: update agent_artifact set status=#{status}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where id=#{id}
